author: codex

scope.selection_note: Focused current post-identity218 backlog pass for community-board generic-number collisions and committee/agency false positives.
scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-community-committee-219-prep.json. No override files, LOG.md, submissions, generated canonical JSONL, canonical.db, materialized outputs, export outputs, validation output files, or wiki files were edited.

current_duplicate_snapshot.method: Read-only local library call to validateRepo from packages/pipeline/src/validate.ts, plus read-only inspection of canonical entity JSONL and raw source blocks.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Parent community board versus its Transportation/Public Transit Committee. These are related Queens CB5 bodies, but the committee should not be collapsed into the parent board as the same canonical identity.

refs.quote: CB5 Transportation Services Committee & Public Transit Services Committee Meeting

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Finance Committee is a board committee; MTA Finance Department Office of Financial Services is a department. The shared finance/workplan keys are functional context, not same-identity evidence.

evidence.payload_summary: entity_type committee; parent_entity Metropolitan Transportation Authority

evidence.display_name: MTA Finance Department Office of Financial Services
evidence.payload_summary: entity_type department; organization Metropolitan Transportation Authority

refs.quote: MTA Finance Department Office of Financial Services May 22, 2023

proposed_durable_mutation_row.reason: MTA Finance Committee is a board committee; MTA Finance Department Office of Financial Services is a department.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Bridges and Tunnels Committee/Members is an MTA board committee context; MTA Bridges and Tunnels is the operating agency / TBTA. The committee oversees agency topics but is not the agency itself.

evidence.payload_summary: entity_type committee; entity_name Bridges and Tunnels Committee; organization MTA Bridges and Tunnels

refs.quote: The legal name of MTA Bridges and Tunnels is Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority.

proposed_durable_mutation_row.reason: Bridges and Tunnels Committee/Members is a board committee context; MTA Bridges and Tunnels / TBTA is the operating agency.

skipped_review_only.reason: Same-borough Queens CB5 shape, but the source block for the alias says Queens Community Board 5 Transportation Committee, so this should be reviewed with the board-versus-committee modeling issue before aliasing.
Plausible same-borough Brooklyn CB11 merge, but prior review notes already call out this exact alias candidate and the current evidence is a combined CBs 11 & 12 outreach reference.
Plausible same-borough Brooklyn CB12 merge, but the candidate id is already present in the richer record's generated aliases, so it was not repeated as a fresh direct alias proposal here.
Likely different project-scoped Community Advisory Committees, but the generic CAC labels need source-specific project confirmation before a durable DNM row.

blockers: Several same-borough community-board candidates are entangled with Transportation Committee records already folded into broader board records; those need a board-versus-committee modeling pass before safe merge proposals.
No override, materialize, validate CLI, export, DB, wiki, or LOG mutation was performed by this prep pass.
